text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This brings back memories of when I was still
acting...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I once performed in a show that hardly garnered
any applause when it ended.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The audience was utterly unimpressed with my
acting that day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The result of today's race makes me feel just like I
did then... I wasn't able to entertain anyone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But I don't have time to mope around.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My dream—my miracle—is still in the making,
after all!
choice_data_list: Everyone believes in you, myself included.
Everyone believes in you, myself included.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My dream—my miracle—is still in the making,
after all!
choice_data_list: Everyone believes in you, myself included.
Everyone believes in you, myself included.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list:
Of course. Didn't you hear them cheering for
you?

Of course. Didn't you hear them cheering for
you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I did... I did hear them! They were all calling my
name!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And as long as I have even one person who
believes in me, I can run to the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And thank you for believing in me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll carve today's loss into my heart and use it as
motivation to stand in the starting gate once
more!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll win my next race and show everyone how much
I appreciate them!
